hero.title: Building scalable systems & beautiful interfaces
hero.description: Software Engineer and UI/UX Designer based in Kigali, Rwanda. Expertise in Java, Spring Boot, full-stack development, and user-centered design — turning complex problems into elegant, scalable solutions.

personal.name: Kayigamba Dukunde Aime
personal.title: Software Engineer & UI/UX Designer
personal.bio: Software Engineer and UI/UX Designer specializing in Java, Spring Boot, full-stack web development, and user-centered design. Experienced in building scalable applications, responsive interfaces, and database-driven systems. Passionate about creating software that is both technically solid and delightful to use.
